newsArray.title: Budding fast bowlers must have aggressive mindset to take wickets, says coach Rao Iftikhar
newsArray.description: Former Pakistan medium pacer now serving as fast bowling coach, Rao Iftikhar, said on Tuesday that fast bowlers must have aggressive mindset with consistent focus on taking wickets, adding that youngsters under training at PCB U-19 skill development camp in Multan would turn out to be beneficial for Pakistan cricket
creator: zeeshan mehtab

newsArray.title: Arnav Paparkar shocks World No. 3 Junior, marches into Wimbledon Boys’ singles third round
newsArray.description: Arnav Paparkar secured a significant win at Wimbledon's junior singles event. He defeated the world's number three junior player, Keaton Hance, in straight sets. Paparkar's strong serving performance was a key factor in his success. He now prepares to face Ryo Tabata in the next round. His parents have supported his tennis journey from a young age.
creator: prajwal hegde

newsArray.title: VVS Laxman To Be Appointed Interim Head Coach Of Team India For Zimbabwe Tour And Asian Games - Report
newsArray.description: VVS Laxman is set to serve as interim head coach for India's upcoming T20I tour of Zimbabwe and the 2026 Asian Games. This probable strategic split coaching structure allows primary head coach Gautam Gambhir to remain focused on the overlapping West Indies home series.

newsArray.title: Hollywood actor? Cristiano Ronaldo told why he can achieve something GOAT rival Lionel Messi never could
newsArray.description: Cristiano Ronaldo has always been a man who thrives under the bright lights of the stadium, but his future could lie under the even brighter lights of Hollywood. According to former France international Emmanuel Petit, the Portuguese superstar possesses a unique quality that his career-long rival Lionel Messi simply lacks.
